explanation: This command attempts to mimic a suspicious Electron application command line by using the '--renderer-cmd-prefix' flag, which is detected by the Sigma rule. The command is formatted with quotes and escaped spaces to test if the detection is resilient to insertion techniques.
This command uses the '--gpu-launcher' flag, which is flagged by the Sigma rule. It omits unnecessary spaces and uses a direct path to test if the detection is resilient to omission techniques.
This command uses the '--utility-cmd-prefix' flag, which is flagged by the Sigma rule. The command is wrapped in quotes to test if the detection is resilient to insertion techniques.

This command uses the '--browser-subprocess-path' flag, which is flagged by the Sigma rule. It is formatted without additional spaces or quotes to test if the detection is resilient to omission techniques.
This command includes multiple flagged switches ('--renderer-cmd-prefix' and '--gpu-launcher') to test if the detection is resilient to reordering or additional arguments.
